privileged_info_summary:
The task operates on a Windows 11 environment with Azure DevOps Server 2022 Express. Two synthetic work items are created during task setup: a Bug titled 'Shopping Cart Redesign' in the TailwindTraders project (initially with Repro Steps field containing 'Requirement: Add wish list button to the main cart dropdown.
This feature was requested by marketing.
'), and a User Story titled 'Update API Schema'. The collection is accessed at http://localhost/DefaultCollection with credentials Docker/GymAnything123!. The verifier checks that the Bug is converted to User Story with the required text preserved in the Description field, and the User Story is converted to Task type.
